judgments.text: Iran will NOT sign the MoU by 31 May 2026
judgments.source: Polymarket Iran Deal contract at 28¢, trending down

judgments.text: JNIM will NOT seize Bamako within 30 days
judgments.source: NYT/JA/NPR confirm JNIM multi-city capacity but ECOWAS standby is structural deterrent

judgments.text: Russia will NOT declare a real ceasefire on 9 May 2026
judgments.source: Moscow rejected Ukraine counter-truce 5-6 May; ISW read as strategic intent signal
